claim: After intelligence, advisory, context injection, and MCP all sit behind the serving namespace, the runtime can move behind the same boundary with a compatibility wrapper.
mechanism: chip_runtime.py is the serving surface's central shared entrypoint. Moving it last lets the rest of the serving modules switch to namespace-local runtime imports in the same tranche, reducing cross-boundary reach-through while preserving the top-level runtime path for external callers.
boundary: This move preserves the public top-level runtime module through a wrapper. It does not change hook semantics or the runtime's manifest contract.
